contracts.summary: Bounded chat inference with tool calls, cancellation, and metered usage.
requiredSemantics: returns one assistant message and non-negative token usage
preserves structured tool calls or an explicitly rejected malformed argument
forwards AbortSignal and the requested output ceiling to the provider request

contracts.summary: Disposable workspace-provider lifecycle and bounded command/file operations.
requiredSemantics: create, describe, exec, UTF-8 read/write, and terminate share one opaque handle
command and file operations are bounded and return structured failures
termination is idempotent and terminal cleanup is observable

contracts.summary: Bounded binary object reads and existence checks.
requiredSemantics: get returns exact bytes and enforces a pre-buffer size limit
exists distinguishes absence from provider failure
errors expose bounded non-secret provider metadata

contracts.summary: Bounded binary object writes with an opaque integrity identifier.
requiredSemantics: put stores exact bytes under the supplied logical key
success returns an opaque ETag or null
retry and maximum-object behavior are declared

contracts.summary: Time-limited object GET and PUT transport URLs.
requiredSemantics: GET and PUT URLs are scoped to one key and bounded expiry
signed URLs are treated as secrets and never persisted in runtime state
the provider declares whether revocation is available

contracts.summary: Batch publication from the transactional outbox.
requiredSemantics: publish accepts stable event IDs, topics, and ordering keys
failure rejects the batch so the outbox can retry
delivery and per-key ordering guarantees are declared

contracts.summary: Execution-scoped credential release after policy authorization.
requiredSemantics: resolution binds tenant, caller lineage, purpose, action, resource, and approval
consumption is atomic and bounded by expiry and use count
secret material never enters model context, arguments, results, or receipts

contracts.summary: Tenant-scoped evidence retrieval through logical knowledge references.
requiredSemantics: provider coordinates resolve server-side from tenant-owned logical names
results are bounded, scored evidence with provenance metadata
missing or unattested tenant bindings fail closed

contracts.summary: Tenant-and-agent-scoped semantic memory search and write.
requiredSemantics: search and write enforce the complete tenant and agent scope
result count and stored entries are bounded
memory is non-authoritative and never replaces the execution ledger
latest or mutable references are rejected during execution
resolved files remain identical across resume
materialization stays within the workspace boundary

contracts.summary: Governed MCP discovery, policy, bounded invocation, and reconciliation.
requiredSemantics: server policy classifies each tool as read or mutation before exposure
responses stream through byte bounds before buffering
mutations declare idempotent, reconcile, or manual recovery semantics
